title: ampelopsis heterophylla var. kulingensis
intro: Ampelopsis heterophylla var. kulingensis, also known as Kuling grapevine or Chinese ivy, is a type of climbing plant in the grape family native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ampelopsis heterophylla var. kulingensis include reducing fever, relieving cough, and promoting digestion, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and cardiovascular protective effects. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often used to prepare decoctions, infusions, and extracts for its medicinal uses.
